posts.author: joe.morgans (Joseph Morgans)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a plugin which can automatically sort one of my boards when a new item is added?

For example, I have a board called to-do. Each task has its own priority (low, med, high, critical). I currently sort the items by priority, but when I add a new one I have to sort it again, can I do this automatically?

Thanks,
Joe

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @joe.morgans

You can do this with a saved view. If you sort by priority as you normally would, but save it as a new view (I called mine 'Sorted by Priority), you will always be able to return to this view to see it sorted and won’t have to re-sort each time you add a new one on the main table.

Let me know if you need a walk-through!
peta@upstreamtech.io
upstream
